# E-TASHLEH | إي-تشليح

> E-TASHLEH is a Saudi marketplace for buying and selling verified new and used auto parts with escrow payments, shipping, and merchant verification. Public marketing pages are listed below; authenticated dashboards require login.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://e-tashleh.net/): Landing page and role selection (customer, merchant, wholesale)
- [How we work](https://e-tashleh.net/how-it-works): Platform workflow and buyer/seller journey
- [Wholesale](https://e-tashleh.net/wholesale): Bulk and wholesale inquiries
- [Terms of service](https://e-tashleh.net/legal/terms): Customer terms and conditions
- [Privacy policy](https://e-tashleh.net/legal/privacy): Data handling and privacy
- [Wallet & loyalty terms](https://e-tashleh.net/legal/wallet-loyalty-terms): Wallet, points, and rewards rules
- [Business license](https://e-tashleh.net/legal/business-license): Nomo economic registry document

## Contact

- [General inquiries](mailto:shop@e-tashleh.shop): shop@e-tashleh.shop
- [Customer support](mailto:cs@e-tashleh.shop): cs@e-tashleh.shop
- [Merchant support](mailto:sl@e-tashleh.shop): sl@e-tashleh.shop
- [Wholesale](mailto:wh@e-tashleh.shop): wh@e-tashleh.shop

## Crawling

- [Sitemap](https://e-tashleh.net/sitemap.xml): Public URL index
- [robots.txt](https://e-tashleh.net/robots.txt): Crawl rules (`/dashboard/` requires authentication)

## API

- [Public API](https://api.e-tashleh.net): Backend for the marketplace (authenticated routes only with valid tokens)
